title: Viewer adopts Repowise-style repo sidebar
summary: Kage viewer should use a Repowise style product frame: persistent left repository sidebar, repo card, route navigation, top status strip, and main content pages for Overview, Graph, Memory, Owners, Intel, Review, and Dat
body: Kage viewer should use a Repowise-style product frame: persistent left repository sidebar, repo card, route navigation, top status strip, and main content pages for Overview, Graph, Memory, Owners, Intel, Review, and Data. Keep Kage's memory/code graph differentiation, but present it through professional repo dashboard structure with metrics and side navigation.
